text:

From-To: open->feedback

Hi, 

make fetch ends with a distfile mismatch; 

===>   the_silver_searcher-0.19.1 depends on file: /usr/local/sbin/pkg - 
found => the_silver_searcher-0.19.1.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in 
/portdistfiles/.  => Attempting to fetch 
https://codeload.github.com/ggreer/the_silver_searcher/legacy.tar.gz/0.19.1?dummy=/the_silver_searcher-0.19.1.tar.gz 
fetch: 
https://codeload.github.com/ggreer/the_silver_searcher/legacy.tar.gz/0.19.1?dummy=/the_silver_searcher-0.19.1.tar.gz: 
size mismatch: expected 48403, actual 48426 

could you please have a look.
